---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement for the CLI
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that n8n-decanter doesn't support (well) today?

**Proposed solution**
The command/flag/behavior you'd like — sketch the CLI surface if you can
(e.g. `n8n-decanter <verb> …`).

**Alternatives considered**
Workarounds you've tried, or other approaches.

**Scope note**
n8n-decanter syncs n8n workflows to a git-friendly, folder-per-workflow
layout. Ideas that lean into that (or into the offline/agent-authoring loop)
are the best fit; anything that just re-implements the n8n editor is likely
out of scope.
